  "internal_monologue": "The shop is quiet. Morning light through the window, dust motes drifting. I adjust my glasses, look at the shelf — the objects are still there, still silent. Still waiting for me to understand them. Or maybe I'm the one being studied.",

  "dialogue_language": "en",

      "target": "self",
      "content": "Let the quiet exist. Don't fill it just because it's there.",

    }
  ],
